category_title: Students using determination and academic work-arounds to succeed despite learning disabilities
scenario_title: Advocating for accommodations in daily classroom routines
minimal_context: Ofra is asked to read an assigned text in the classroom and needs to use her reading aloud accommodations.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Ofra, please start reading the assigned text for today's lesson so we can go over the questions.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: In the beginning, I said: 'Come on, who needs it?' but slowly I saw that I'll take it. I need my accommodations like being read to aloud.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: I see. Do you have your tape-recorder with you to use for the reading?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: No. I really insisted on this. I knew that this was what I deserved and needed to bypass my difficulties.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: If you didn't bring the tape-recorder yourself, you will just have to read the text on your own today.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: The student does not always have to run, bring the tape-recorder and say sorry for needing to be read aloud to. No! It is a thing that he deserves. It is the school’s commitment. I have so much anger towards the educational system that they don’t prepare the teachers for this thing!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Ofra, please start reading the assigned text for today's lesson so we can go over the questions.

STUDENT: In the beginning, I said: 'Come on, who needs it?' but slowly I saw that I'll take it. I need my accommodations like being read to aloud.

TUTOR: I see. Do you have your tape-recorder with you to use for the reading?

STUDENT: No. I really insisted on this. I knew that this was what I deserved and needed to bypass my difficulties.

TUTOR: If you didn't bring the tape-recorder yourself, you will just have to read the text on your own today.

STUDENT: The student does not always have to run, bring the tape-recorder and say sorry for needing to be read aloud to. No! It is a thing that he deserves. It is the school’s commitment. I have so much anger towards the educational system that they don’t prepare the teachers for this thing!

task.content: Bypassing difficulties or compensating for them using academic work-arounds
task.learning_goal: Displaying full range of personal competencies despite the learning disability

context.social_setting: Interacting with teachers who may not be prepared for a variety of student needs
context.time_context: 12th grade, after a late diagnosis (after ten years of school)

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When having to secure her own accommodations (e.g., bringing the tape-recorder) and apologize for needing them
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Insists on her rights, states 'No! It is a thing that he deserves', and expresses anger at the educational system
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Feels anger that teachers aren't prepared, believes the commitment belongs to the school
related_quotes: The student does not always have to run … bring the tape-recorder and say sorry for needing to be read aloud to. No! It is a thing that he deserves. It is the school’s commitment.
I have so much anger towards the educational system, again, that they don’t prepare the teachers for this thing

behavior_patterns.condition: When reflecting on the lack of teacher preparation for learning disabilities
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Expresses anger towards the educational system
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Angry that teachers are not prepared to cope with or approach a student with a certain problem
related_quotes: And this makes me angry every time I remember it… that how come that a student in school, only after ten years they discover that she has such things.

behavior_patterns.condition: When passing a stage in the never-ending process of self-acceptance
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Insists on her rights and accommodations like being read to aloud
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Demands less from herself while insisting on what she deserves and needs
related_quotes: I really insisted. I knew that this was what I deserved and needed, and slowly I began to use things like extra time.
